title: Xbox confirms 3,200 layoffs and the biggest restructuring in its history
summary: Microsoft lets go of four studios and reduces its workforce in the most significant reorganization of its gaming division.

title: Xbox sells or spins off studios like Arkane, Double Fine, and Ninja Theory
summary: The restructuring forces iconic studios to seek new owners or return to independence, leaving projects like Marvel's Blade in limbo.

title: ZeniMax focuses its resources on Fallout, The Elder Scrolls, and other major franchises after layoffs
summary: Bethesda and its associated studios suffer deep cuts as the company refocuses its strategy on its main franchises, including Doom and Quake.

title: The video game industry is divided over the rise of digital and the defense of physical discs
summary: While Sony faces criticism for moving away from the format and a petition exceeds 120,000 signatures, Xbox confirms that Halo will be released on disc and Kojima laments the loss of player ownership.

title: Xbox CEO admits that the company overextended itself and sets an audience goal criticized as unrealistic
summary: Asha Sharma acknowledges past mistakes and proposes entertaining one billion people per day, a goal that specialized press calls delusional.

title: Nintendo will discontinue the original Switch in Europe in 2027 and prepares a Switch 2 revision with a removable battery
summary: The company confirms the end of the current Switch family in the European market and details plans for a new hardware revision for its successor.

title: Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls is not available in more than 130 countries due to PSN regional blocking
summary: The new fighting game suffers the same problem as Helldivers 2 by requiring a PlayStation Network account in territories without support, generating strong criticism of Sony.

title: Interest in Steam Machine and its controller resurges with the discovery of prototypes and the 'red line of death'
summary: The discovery of a second prototype of the original Steam controller and the recovery of a console with the feared visual error reignite interest in Valve's defunct hardware.

title: Game Pass subscriptions drop to 30 million and Microsoft acknowledges the failure of the business model
summary: After losing millions of subscribers since 2024, the Xbox CEO admits that the subscription service has not met growth expectations.

title: A new viral outbreak spreads through World of Warcraft reviving the legendary 'Corrupted Blood' incident
summary: A powerful debuff escapes from its dungeon and wreaks havoc among players, evoking the famous 2005 outbreak that was studied by epidemiologists.

title: The video game industry demands better working conditions and government support in the face of the layoff crisis
summary: While unions create aid funds for those affected, Spanish studios call on the Government for the necessary support to compete globally.

title: The Persona 4 anime returns to the spotlight with its free broadcast and the resurgence of interest in the franchise
summary: Fans celebrate the return of the original anime on YouTube as anticipation for the future of the series grows.

title: Steam Summer Sale and Switch eShop offer their last bargains with discounts up to 90%
summary: Both platforms announce the end of their summer promotions with standout deals for players.

title: Katsuhiro Harada criticizes those who judge games by their sales and compares Sakurai to a 'Saiyan'
summary: The Tekken producer rails against measuring success solely by numbers and praises the superhuman dedication of the creator of Smash Bros.

title: The studio of 'Paddle Paddle Paddle' reveals that its game has been refunded 55,000 times due to its short length
summary: Despite very positive reviews on Steam, the developer confirms that most refunds are because the game is completed in under two hours.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced leads this week's releases alongside other anticipated titles
summary: The remaster of Ubisoft's classic pirate game arrives in stores in a week full of new releases for PC and consoles.

title: Summer Games Done Quick 2026 begins with a week dedicated to charity speedrunning
summary: The annual fundraising event returns to showcase the best speedruns, offering a positive respite in the current state of the industry.

title: Cyberpunk 2077 reaches a new sales milestone and the second season of Edgerunners receives critical acclaim
summary: CD Projekt Red celebrates the RPG's longevity while Studio Trigger's anime is acclaimed for its new story arc.
